name: megabro
description: AI-powered Gemini computer-use interface. Install. Type megabro. Get to work.

scripts.test: node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); const fs=require('fs'); ['index.js','bin/cli.js','public/index.html'].forEach(f=>{if(!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('Missing: '+f)}); console.log('All checks passed')"
scripts.setup:termux: pkg update && pkg install x11-repo tigervnc fluxbox chromium xdotool scrot python git -y && pip install google-genai pillow fastapi uvicorn websockify

author: Aman
